title: Extra netherite Armor
description: a mod that adds 5 variants of netherite armor.
body:
a mod that adds 5 different 'augments' to netherite armor that provide passive buffs when the player has the full set.
- echoing: gives darkness immunity and regeneration, also allows for health boost at a high enough level. (echo shards)
- glistening: gives haste and slow falling (amethyst)
- conducting: gives speed, jump boost, and dolphin's grace (copper)
- blessed: gives luck, also gives hero of the village at a high enough level (nether quartz)
- creaking: gives night vision and resistance, it also makes piglins neutral. (resin)

also adds the 'totem of protection' that allows the player to level up their armor, giving stronger buffs and extra buffs if high enough level.

 also on curseforge!
